tasks.name: Execution preflight gate (feature start)
tasks.description: Run the feature start gate to confirm the Planning Pack is runnable and Phase A/B gates are explicitly covered before starting execution triads.
acceptance_criteria: execution_preflight_report.md records ACCEPT or REVISE with explicit required fixes
Phase A/B gates (ADR-0012) are explicitly verified as covered by slice acceptance criteria and validation artifacts

Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
end_checklist: Fill execution_preflight_report.md with a concrete recommendation and required fixes (if any)
Set status to completed; add END entry; commit docs

tasks.name: WCU1 — Workspace directory + internal git unification (code)
tasks.description: Implement the canonical `<workspace_root>/.substrate/` layout, internal git under `.substrate/git/repo.git/`, and workspace disable marker handling.
acceptance_criteria: Workspace root discovery uses `.substrate/workspace.yaml` and ignores disabled workspaces via `.substrate/workspace.disabled`
Internal git is located at `.substrate/git/repo.git/` and `.substrate-git/` is not used
start_checklist: Read: plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, ADR-0008, kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
end_checklist: cargo fmt
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
From inside the worktree: make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="WCU1-code"

tasks.name: WCU1 — Integration core
tasks.description: Merge WCU1 code+tests, reconcile to spec/ADR, and make the slice green on the primary dev platform.
acceptance_criteria: Core slice is green under make integ-checks and matches ADR-0008 / WCU1 spec
CI compile parity is green for this exact HEAD
Behavioral smoke dispatched via CI and run ids/URLs are recorded
start_checklist: Read plan.md, tasks.json, session_log.md, ADR-0008, WCU1 spec, kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
end_checklist: Merge WCU1 code+test branches; resolve drift to ADR/spec (ADR wins)
cargo fmt
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
Run relevant tests
make integ-checks
Dispatch CI compile parity: make ci-compile-parity CI_WORKFLOW_REF="feat/workspace-config-policy-unification" CI_REMOTE=origin CI_CLEANUP=1 (record run id/URL)

Dispatch behavioral smoke via CI: make feature-smoke FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/next/workspace-config-policy-unification" PLATFORM=behavior SMOKE_SLICE_ID="WCU1" RUNNER_KIND=self-hosted WORKFLOW_REF="feat/workspace-config-policy-unification" REMOTE=origin CLEANUP=1 RUN_INTEG_CHECKS=1 (record run id/URL)

If any platform smoke fails: start only failing platform-fix tasks via: make triad-task-start-platform-fixes-from-smoke FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/next/workspace-config-policy-unification" SLICE_ID="WCU1" SMOKE_RUN_ID="<run-id>" LAUNCH_CODEX=1

After all failing platforms are green: start final aggregator via: make triad-task-start-integ-final FEATURE_DIR="docs/project_management/next/workspace-config-policy-unification" SLICE_ID="WCU1" LAUNCH_CODEX=1
From inside the worktree: make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="WCU1-integ-core"
Update tasks/session_log on orchestration branch; do not delete worktrees (feature cleanup removes worktrees at feature end)

tasks.name: WCU2 — Patch parsing + merge (ADR-0012 Phase A) (code)
tasks.description: Implement schema-defined per-key merge strategies and multi-source provenance support required by ADR-0012.
acceptance_criteria: Config schema assigns merge_strategy per key (default=replace; `world.deps.enabled`=concat_dedupe_ordered_set)

Config schema allowlists `world.deps.inventory_mode` (enum; allowed values exactly `merged|workspace_only`) and `world.deps.builtins` (enum; allowed values exactly `enabled|disabled`), both with merge_strategy=replace
`config current show --explain` emits deterministic JSON on stderr with per-key merge_strategy and sources[] (replace: exactly one source; merge keys: multi-source in application order)
start_checklist: Read: ADR-0008, ADR-0012, PHASE_A_B_GATES, plan.md, kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
end_checklist: cargo fmt
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
From inside the worktree: make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="WCU2-code"

tasks.description: Add tests for per-key merge strategies and multi-source provenance output required by ADR-0012.
acceptance_criteria: Unit tests cover replace (single-source provenance) and concat_dedupe_ordered_set (concat+dedupe ordered-set output + multi-source provenance ordering)
Unit tests cover enum validation for `world.deps.inventory_mode` and `world.deps.builtins` (invalid value is exit 2; no writes)
Determinism test(s) prove `--explain` stderr JSON bytes are identical for identical inputs

tasks.name: WCU3 — CLI scopes + reset semantics + explain (ADR-0012 Phase B) (code)
tasks.description: Ensure config editor allowlists and edits `world.deps.enabled` and that `--explain` surfaces merge strategy and contributing sources per ADR-0012.
acceptance_criteria: Config schema allowlist includes `world.deps.enabled` (type list[string], merge_strategy=concat_dedupe_ordered_set)

Config editor supports `world.deps.enabled+=<item>`, `world.deps.enabled-=<item>`, and `reset world.deps.enabled` at both global and workspace scopes (patch list write-time de-dupe; `-=` is exact-match removal; reset removes the key from the patch mapping)

Config editor supports `world.deps.inventory_mode=<merged|workspace_only>` and `world.deps.builtins=<enabled|disabled>` at both global and workspace scopes, and `reset` removes each key from the patch mapping (inherit-only)
Invalid enum values for `world.deps.inventory_mode` and `world.deps.builtins` are exit 2 and perform no writes (patch bytes unchanged; comment header preserved)
Workspace disabled marker ignores workspace patch contribution for `world.deps.inventory_mode` and `world.deps.builtins` (effective values and `--explain` provenance fall back to global/default)
`config current show --explain` reports merge_strategy and sources[] (includes both `global_patch` and `workspace_patch` when both scopes contribute)
start_checklist: Read: ADR-0008, ADR-0012, PHASE_A_B_GATES, manual_testing_playbook.md, kickoff prompt
Set status to in_progress; add START entry; commit docs
end_checklist: cargo fmt
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
From inside the worktree: make triad-task-finish TASK_ID="WCU3-code"

tasks.name: WCU3 — CLI scopes + reset semantics + explain (ADR-0012 Phase B) (test)
tasks.description: Add tests proving config editor support for `world.deps.enabled` and `--explain` provenance for a multi-layer merged key.
acceptance_criteria: Integration tests cover global + workspace `+=` and `-=` edits to `world.deps.enabled` and effective concat+dedupe ordered-set behavior (including a deliberate duplicate across scopes)
Integration tests cover workspace disabled marker ignores workspace contribution for `world.deps.enabled`
Integration tests cover global + workspace `set`/`reset` for `world.deps.inventory_mode` and `world.deps.builtins` with replace precedence and single-source provenance
Integration tests cover invalid enum values for `world.deps.inventory_mode` and `world.deps.builtins` are exit 2 and perform no writes (patch bytes unchanged; comment header preserved)

Integration tests cover workspace disabled marker ignores workspace contribution for `world.deps.inventory_mode` and `world.deps.builtins` (effective values and `--explain` provenance fall back to global/default)
`--explain` goldens cover merge_strategy and multi-source sources[] ordering for `world.deps.enabled`
